name: economy-indicators
description: Economic downturn indicator dashboard - fetches data from FRED API and other sources

scripts.api-pull:all: node scripts/api-pull-weekly.js && node scripts/api-pull-monthly.js && node scripts/api-pull-quarterly.js && node scripts/api-pull-buy-signal.js
scripts.api-pull:all:force: node scripts/api-pull-weekly.js --force && node scripts/api-pull-monthly.js --force && node scripts/api-pull-quarterly.js --force && node scripts/api-pull-buy-signal.js --force
